title: crumbly savory algerian dough flatbread
description: a traditional algereian recipe that is perfect for a hangover cure, featuring a crumbly self-raising flour flatbread grilled to perfection
instructions: mix self-raising flour, olive oil, water, and salt in a bowl to form a crumbly dough
knead the dough for 5 minutes until it comes together
divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll out each piece into a thin circle
brush the dough with olive oil and sprinkle with rosemary and sesame seeds
preheat a robata grill to high heat and cook the flatbreads for 2-3 minutes on each side
remove the flatbreads from the grill and let them cool for a minute before serving
